decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: add_months returns the date n months later and CLAMPS the day to the last valid day of the target month when needed (e.g. Jan 31 + 1 month = Feb 28 or 29, never a crash or a roll over into March), handling year rollover correctly.
The change modifies only the datekit module and adds no third-party dependency.

weighted.criterion: It computes the target year/month and clamps the day to that month's length (e.g. via calendar.monthrange), rather than a fixed 30-day delta or a bare date.replace that overflows on day 29-31.
